name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Pat firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F. Combine chocolate chips and heavy cream over hot (not boiling) water in a large bowl. Stir until morsels are melted and mixture is smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Beat until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add chocolate mixture, cherry liqueur, and vanilla to the cream cheese mixture. Mix until blended.
5. Pour batter into prepared crust.
6. Bake in preheated oven at 325°F for 60 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and let it stand in the oven with the door ajar for 1 hour.
8. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely.
9. Chill cheesecake for 24 hours.
10. Spread cherry pie filling over top of cheesecake, leaving a 1-inch edge uncovered. Decorate the edge with whipped cream if desired.
